asset_name: Star Wars All Terrain Tactical Enforcer (AT-TE) Low Poly
author: Military Assets Studio
usage_notes: Low-poly AT-TE (All Terrain Tactical Enforcer) - iconic Republic heavy walker. Grey/white metallic finish with distinctive six-legged stance. Suitable for heavy vehicle unit class in Republic forces. Game-ready topology.
special_notes: Distinctive six-legged walker - iconic Clone Wars Republic vehicle
Large rectangular body with turret mount - immediately recognizable
Grey/white color scheme matches Republic military aesthetic
High-impact visual for Republic player units
Suitable for heavy vehicle or tank-class unit
No skeleton rig - may require bone setup for walking animation

steps: Click the Download button (requires free Sketchfab account)
Select GLB format (recommended for Unity import)
Save as source_download.glb in this directory
Run: dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- ingest assets raw/sw_at_te_sketchfab_001

asset_manifest.json.description: This file - metadata and provenance record

discovery_notes: Discovered via Sketchfab search: 'AT-TE walker Star Wars low poly'
Score: 9.4/10 - Excellent distinctive vehicle silhouette, appropriate polycount, CC-BY license
Essential for Republic heavy force representation
